label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The problem is asking for the date a month ago from today, which is 9/7 (September 7th), but Jane is watching the NFL from 2003. So I need to figure out what the date was a month prior to September 7th, 2003. First, I need to understand what "a month ago" means. Generally, a month ago would be the same day in the previous month. So if today is September 7th, then a month ago would be August 7th. Let me check the options. Option F is 08/07/2003. That seems straightforward. But wait, I should make sure there's no trick here. For example, sometimes when people refer to a month ago, they might subtract exactly 30 days. Let me check what date is exactly 30 days before September 7th. August has 31 days, so 30 days before September 7th would be August 8th (because August has 31 days, so September 7th minus 30 days would be August 8th). Wait, no, if you subtract 30 days from September 7th, you count back 30 days. Let's count. September has 30 or 31? September has 30 days? Wait no, September has 30 days. Wait, no, September has 30 days, October has 31, etc. Wait, September has 30 days. So if today is September 7th, and we subtract 30 days, we go back to August. How many days in August? 31. So if I
